  • High Resolution: Boasts a high-resolution screen, providing crisp and detailed graphics.

3. Performance:

  • Powerful Processor: Equipped with a high-performance processor capable of running the latest games smoothly.
  • Advanced Graphics: Integrated with top-tier graphics capabilities, it supports detailed and immersive gaming experiences.
  • Efficient Cooling System: Designed with an effective cooling system to maintain optimal performance during long gaming sessions.

  • 1TB Internal Storage: Offers a massive 1TB of internal storage, allowing for a vast library of games and media.

5. Battery Life:

6. Connectivity and Compatibility:

  • Wide Range of Games: Compatible with a vast library of games from the Steam store.
  • Multiple Connectivity Options: Includes Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, and USB-C connectivity for easy connection to various peripherals and the internet.
  • Cross-Platform Play: Supports cross-platform play, enabling you to connect with friends regardless of the device they use.

7. Software and User Interface:

  • Customizable Interface: Offers a user-friendly and customizable interface, making it easy to navigate your game library and settings.
  • Regular Updates: Receives regular software updates, ensuring the device stays up-to-date with the latest features and security enhancements.

8. Additional Features:

  • Touchscreen: Incorporates a responsive touchscreen for intuitive navigation and gameplay.
  • Built-in Controllers: Comes with high-quality, built-in controllers that are responsive and comfortable to use.

9. Portability:

  • Lightweight and Portable: Its compact size and lightweight design make it ideal for gaming on-the-go.

10. Community and Support:

  • Active Community: Access to a vibrant community of gamers and developers.
  • Reliable Customer Support: Backed by reliable customer support for troubleshooting and assistance.

AdditionalAttributes.description:
The SatKing Pro Max Fully automatic motorised satellite TV dish system is the most advanced system on the market, utilizing the latest in flat panel antenna design. This motorised satellite system suits Foxtel and VAST satellite TV. The unit has dual LNB outputs to suit twin tuner STB's like Foxtel IQ/Austar MyStar and VAST twin tuner receivers.

The SatKing Pro Max is very simple to use simply turn the unit on and the built in GPS system will locate your required satellite fast. Another great benefit of having a built in GPS system is that if you forget to return the unit to the home position the motorised dish will automatically retract once the vehicle is travelling above 10Kph (the unit needs to be powered).

Flat panel satellite antennas also take up a great deal less space on the roof of your van leaving you with more choices for the exact location on your roof in between solar panels and air conditioners. Flat panel satellite TV antennas offer higher signal gain than equivalent size offset satellite TV dishes and has been recently upgrade to now provide Australia wide coverage (excluding the tip of Cape York). The SatKing Pro Max moves on 3 axis meaning the old days of having to manually get up on the roof of the van to adjust LNB skew (turning the LNB clockwise or anti clockwise) when you are travelling from say Melbourne across to Adelaide and then to Perth are gone. The complete head of the antenna simply adjust automatically for you. Automatic skew will also improve the signal quality to assist you further.

The SatKing Pro Max is precision made for Harsh Australian conditions, it is rugged in construction with all gears being metal for long life. The unit is backed with a 3 year Australian warranty. The unit is made in Korea, Korea is famous for making high quality and latest technology products.

The SatKing Pro Max comes with detailed instructions for self installation. You may wish to have the SatKing Pro Max as standard equipment when you order your van, let you dealer know and they will organise with us directly for you. The Pro Max may have already been installed on your van when you purchased the vehicle, no problems we will still give you all the support you require just give us a call.

Peace of mind, this unit is supported by SatKing's 1300 Help line to assist with your initial set up and support you as required along all of your travels. SatKing is a large Australian owned company with a government approved satellite receiver so we are here to stay!

Features:

  • Fully automatic self aligning
  • Pre-Programmed to receive VAST and Foxtel/Austar
  • Australia wide coverage
  • Flat panel design offers the most compact size with big performance
  • Dual output LNB as standard to suit twin tuner STB's
  • Built in 24 Channel GPS to find satellites fast
  • Not affected by wind like the large round dishes that need to be retracted when windy and cause picture break up's when the wind blows
  • Last position memory to save on search times
  • Suitable for Caravan, motorhome, motor vehicle and camping use
  • Automatic retraction when you exceed 10KPH, unit must be powered
  • Automatic LNB skew
  • Powerful DC motors with metal gears
  • Can be self installed, detailed instructions and roof mount included
  • 3 Year warranty
  • 1300 Number help line (with no answering machine)
  • Made for harsh Australian conditions
  • Requires less roof area than conventional dish antenna's with a big arm, so you can position the unit where you want on the roof of the van
  • Made in Korea

  • Searching time: 80 Seconds (Average)

  • Input Voltage: DC 12 or 24V auto selection

AdditionalAttributes.description:
Perfect Preowned is here to provide exceptional value for the customer by using industry-leading technology solutions & proven best practices to recycle, reuse and refurbish essential technology products to extend their life cycle while benefiting the environment.

Refurbished  Grade A+ (As New Condition)

This device has been through a careful inspection and testing process, and is in As New condition, without any visible sign of previous use anywhere on the device. The product is in full working order, comes in brand new generic packaging and comes with a warranty.

Cat S62 (5.65'', 128GB/4GB, Rugged phone)

The Cat S62 is engineered with a superior level of rugged protection in a pocket friendly design. If you work hard and play hard, the Cat S62 is tough enough to survive the drops, bumps and dings of the day to day while still providing the reliability that our customers expect from Caterpillar's category-leading rugged credentials.

Designed primarily for extreme work conditions, The Cat S62 is Non-Incendive protected; meeting stringent safety requirements for protection in hazardous working environments. Its Superbright 5.7" display is also protected by scratch and shatter resistant Corning® Gorilla® Glass 6 and optimized for outdoor use with wet-finger/glove-on working technology.

We know that for our Construction and Emergency Services users; reliable equipment can mean the difference between life and death. That's why we combine military grade technology with lessons learned from those in the field. We also appreciate that for our Logistics users; device failure can result in huge amounts of wasted time, failure to hit targets and substantial loss of earnings. You can take the Cat S62 with you anywhere and everywhere. It's built tough to help you thrive in challenging outdoor work situations and extreme leisure pursuits alike.

We've added a fingerprint sensor, boosted the memory to 4GB RAM / 128 GB ROM and included a faster chipset and Android 10. Equipped with a 4000mAh battery that supports Qi Wireless Charging, Quick Charge 4.0 and POGO pins for quick power when and where you need it, the Cat S62 is the ultimate work phone.

In the hands of workers, from contractors to health care workers and farmers to delivery drivers, we know our devices can get dusty and dirty. Cat phones are extremely easy to clean with no need for additional cases which trap and accumulate germs. And in these times of hygiene vigilance, it's even more important that our products can be repeatedly submerged and scrubbed with hot water and soap and withstand chemicals, bleaches and sanitizers; keeping you and others safe.

Being able to take a kicking (drop, water and dust proof) and having the highest MILSPEC and IP protection ratings no longer means that phones need to be basic and ugly. Our latest smartphones also use the most advanced materials and machine finishes and are designed to be as stylish as they are rugged.

Because business never stops, the Cat S62 includes Android Enterprise support for major EMM solutions and a fingerprint sensor for enhanced security. It also features a yellow programmable key useful for Push To Talk or to easily turn the flashlight or launch an important app.

AdditionalAttributes.description:
The PXN V10 Pro Racing Bundle (3-Pedal) delivers a premium, realistic sim-racing experience, engineered for gamers seeking high performance and precision. Designed for use with PC, PS4, Xbox One, and Xbox Series X|S (PS5 supported when paired with the PXN N5 Converter - sold separately), this direct-drive system features a servo motor wheelbase generating 3.2 Nm torque for powerful, true-to-life force feedback.

Equipped with a 16-bit encoder resolution, the V10 Pro ensures ultra-precise steering input. The detachable 270 mm (11-inch) steering wheel supports 270°/900° rotation to match different racing styles, while the companion APP and PC software allow advanced control, parameter adjustments, and configuration presets for a personalised racing setup.

The included three-pedal set features a Hall effect sensor, adjustable pedal curve, and spring force for finely tuned throttle, brake, and clutch response. Built with durable materials and designed for competitive endurance, the PXN V10 Pro is equally suited for casual racers and dedicated sim enthusiasts.

Key Features:

  • Servo direct-drive motor base with 3.2 Nm torque for powerful, realistic force feedback.
  • High-precision 16-bit encoder for accurate steering input.
  • Detachable 270 mm (11-inch) wheel with adjustable 270°/900° rotation for versatile racing styles.
  • APP and PC software for advanced control, parameter settings, and configuration presets.
  • Three-pedal set with Hall sensor, adjustable pedal curve, and customisable spring force.
  • Compatible with PC, PS4, Xbox One, Xbox Series X|S; PS5 support with PXN N5 Converter (sold separately).
  • Built for durability with premium materials for long-term gaming use.

Specifications:

  • Connection: USB wired
  • Power Supply: DC24V (2A), USB 5V (≤500 mA)
  • Dimensions: Wheel - 270 × 280 × 249 mm; Pedals - 362 × 380 × 213 mm
  • Weight: Approx. 5.62 kg
  • Colour: Black
  • Operating Temp: 10-40 ℃
  • Humidity Range: 20-80%

Inclusions:

  • 1 × Racing Wheel
  • 1 × Pedal Set
  • 2 × Mount Clamps
  • 1 × Power Adapter
  • 1 × Micro USB Cable (for controller)
  • 1 × Type-C Cable (for controller)
  • 1 × Allen Wrench
  • 1 × User Manual

Returns Policy

Faulty Products:

We accept faulty returns in accordance with manufacturer warranty terms. Our goods come with guarantees that cannot be excluded under the Australian Consumer Law. You are entitled to a replacement or refund for a major failure and compensation for any other reasonably foreseeable loss or damage. You are also entitled to have the goods repaired or replaced if the goods fail to be of acceptable quality and the failure does not amount to a major failure.

If you find the product is faulty, please get in contact with us. We will provide a Return Authorization number and instructions on where to return. Item will be checked and fault verified before a remedy is provided. If fault is verified, we will refund the item and reimburse you for the cost of return shipping, if a receipt is provided. If the item is not faulty, you will be responsible for the cost of receiving your returned goods back to your nominated address.

 

Change of Mind:

Change of mind returns are also accepted in accordance the terms outlined here. We will allow a return for store credit or exchange product where you have changed your mind, provided that the item in question is:

a)       returned within 14 days of receiving order;

b)      as new and is not used, worn, or opened and has all original packaging and tags in-tact (including any package seals (if any) being unbroken);

c)       is not an excluded item as outlined following

d)      in a resalable condition; and

e)      not damaged in any way.

We cannot accept change of mind returns on items that come in sealed packages or boxes where seals are damaged or broken. To return your item for change or mind, you must follow our returns process.

You will be responsible for the cost and risk of returning goods, including the cost of return shipping. If the item is not received by us, you will not be eligible for a credit or exchange. We recommend you insure high value items that you return for change of mind.

You may be provided with a product exchange, refund or store credit (at our discretion) only when the returned product is received, and it complies with the requirements outlined here.

If the returned item does not meet the conditions of this policy, you will be responsible for the cost of receiving your returned goods back to your nominated address

Change of mind returns are not accepted for intimates, which includes underwear, hosiery, socks, swimwear and adult toys due to hygienic reasons. Remedies for defective goods are still available. Under no circumstances can change of mind returns for digital access codes or downloadable software be accepted.

AdditionalAttributes.description:
Get an edge in gameplay by creating your own custom controls to fit your playstyle. Built with high performance and personalization in mind, the DualSense Edge(TM) wireless controller invites you to craft your own unique gaming experience so you can play your way.

Key Features

Changeable stick modules and stick caps
Aim and move with precision by swapping in fresh stick modules* so you're always playing with equipment that's in great shape. Plus, three types of changeable stick caps help you stay comfortable in-game without sacrificing grip or stability.

Mappable back buttons
The DualSense Edge(TM) wireless controller's two swappable sets of back buttons can be configured to many other button inputs, so you've always got game-changing actions and essential controls at your fingertips.

Adjustable trigger lengths
Manually set the travel distance of your left and right triggers for an optimal experience with whatever you're playing. Fast-paced FPS? Set a shorter travel distance to shoot faster on the field. Competitive racer? Set a longer travel distance for precise throttle control on the track.

Remappable buttons
Remap or even deactivate various button inputs, so you can create a completely personalized control setup that's ideal for the game at hand.

Adjustable stick sensitivity, trigger dead zones, and vibration intensity
Configure your stick sensitivity, stick dead zones, and trigger dead zones for finely tuned inputs, and even set your vibration intensity for a completely customized play experience.

Quick-swap control profiles
Once you've found your ideal control settings, you can save them to unique profiles and swap between them on-the-fly, so your favourite configurations are always ready when you are.

On-controller user interface
Quickly swap between your pre-set control profiles and adjust game volume and chat balance** all from the DualSense Edge(TM) wireless controller's dedicated function button, allowing you to easily adjust your setup while staying focused on the in-game action. Using the Fn button, you can also instantly access the controller settings menu to easily setup and test new control iterations.

DualSense(TM) wireless controller features built in
Enjoy all the immersive features of the DualSense(TM) wireless controller, including haptic feedback, adaptive triggers***, a built-in microphone, motion controls and more in supported titles.

Signature comfort and slip-resistant inner grips
Enjoy the same signature comfort of the original DualSense(TM) wireless controller, now enhanced with slip-resistant inner grips. Ideal for long sessions in single player games and staying comfortable during intense competitive play.

Replaceable Stick Modules
Play for longer with swappable replacement stick modules available to purchase separately.

Ready for high-stakes play
Play with confidence in your connection using the included [2.8M / 9.1ft] long USB Type-C(R) braided cable featuring a connector housing that locks your USB in place so it's much less likely to slip out at a crucial moment.

Made with input from developers and pro players
Designed in collaboration with pro gamers and game developers, the DualSense Edge(TM) wireless controller leverages powerful insights to offer new tactical options and enhancements for your favourite games.

Carrying Case
Keep your DualSense Edge(TM) wireless controller and its components together and organized in one spot with an included Carrying Case. You can even charge the controller via USB connection while it's stored in the case to make sure you're always ready for your next play session.

Quick access profile settings menu
Simply press the Fn button and Options button while in game to open the customization menu, where you can quickly change your settings.

DualSense(TM) charging station*
Conveniently charge your DualSense Edge(TM) wireless controller with the official DualSense(TM) charging station. Easily dock your new controller with the charging station's click-in design which supports both the DualSense(TM) and DualSense Edge(TM) wireless controller.

*Sold separately.
**Analog audio connection to headset required for full compatibility. Audio balance adjustable when in party chat.
***Haptic feedback and adaptive trigger features available when supported by game.

We're proud to introduce our newest 12V television: the X90 series. As the pinnacle of our current range, we've made sure the 32” X90 is the best 12V TV in Australia. We've upgraded the screen. We've upgraded the sound. We've made it faster, larger, louder, and better than ever before. If you want the best 12V TV money can buy, the search is over - it doesn't get any better than this.

Key Features
Full HD LED Screen

The LED32X90 comes with a 32” (81cm) Full HD LED screen with a resolution of 1920 x 1080. The crisp and deep picture quality that comes with this is superior to most other 12V TVs on the market, meaning you can enjoy your favourite shows wherever you are in their full glory. 

Improved Sound Quality

ENGLAON TVs are known for their superior depth of sound, and in the X90 we've taken additional steps to improve this by featuring 2 x 10W Dolby speakers. These provide an immersive audio experience by allowing the speakers to handle more power. 

Bezel Free Edges

We've also reduced the size of the surrounding edges of the TV on three sides, allowing us to maximize screen size while improving overall aesthetics. 

Built-In Chromecast

This allows you to stream from your phone directly to your TV, so whether you're watching home movies, swiping through your images, or just playing your favourite music, your phone can become the TV's remote control. 

Versatility & Durability

Like all our TVs, the X90 is compatible with both 12V DC & 240V AC power supplies, meaning it works just as well when you're on the road as it does when you're at home on the couch. You can have the same entertainment experience wherever you are, and thanks to our extensive vibration testing, the X90 can handle the knocks & bumps that come with life on the road without issue. 

Other Features:

On top of all the amazing features above, the LED32X90 also comes with:

  • 10 - 30V Surge Protection
  • Built-in Bluetooth

AdditionalAttributes.description:
40” FHD  |  1920 x 1080 |  Smart TV  |  Google TV OS  |  Bluetooth  |  Wi-Fi  |  Google Cast  |  12V & 240V Adaptor  |  2x 10W Speakers  |  HD Tuner  | 50W Power Consumption  |  Voice Activated Remote  |  Google Assistant  |  Vibration Resistance  |  Frameless Design

We're proud to introduce our newest 12V television: the X90 series. As the pinnacle of our current range, we've made sure the 40” X90 is the best 12V TV in Australia. We've upgraded the screen. We've upgraded the sound. We've made it faster, larger, louder, and better than ever before. If you want the best 12V TV money can buy, the search is over - it doesn't get any better than this.

Key Features
Full HD LED Screen

The LED40X90 comes with a 40” (102cm) Full HD LED screen with a resolution of 1920 x 1080. The crisp and deep picture quality that comes with this is superior to most other 12V TVs on the market, meaning you can enjoy your favourite shows wherever you are in their full glory. 

Improved Sound Quality

ENGLAON TVs are known for their superior depth of sound, and in the X90 we've taken additional steps to improve this by featuring 2 x 10W Dolby speakers. These provide an immersive audio experience by allowing the speakers to handle more power. 

Bezel Free Edges

We've also reduced the size of the surrounding edges of the TV on three sides, allowing us to maximize screen size while improving overall aesthetics. 

Built-In Google Cast

This allows you to stream from your phone directly to your TV, so whether you're watching home movies, swiping through your images, or just playing your favourite music, your phone can become the TV's remote control. 

Versatility & Durability

Like all our TVs, the X90 is compatible with both 12V DC & 240V AC power supplies, meaning it works just as well when you're on the road as it does when you're at home on the couch. You can have the same entertainment experience wherever you are, and thanks to our extensive vibration testing, the X90 can handle the knocks & bumps that come with life on the road without issue. 

Other Features:

On top of all the amazing features above, the LED40X90 also comes with:

  • 10 - 30V Surge Protection
  • Built-in Bluetooth
  • Built-in Wi-Fi for both 2.4GHz & 5GHz networks
  • Google Assistant
  • Voice-activated remote control
In The Box
  • TV Console & Stand
  • 240V Power Adaptor
  • 12V Car Lead
  • Voice Activated Remote Control + Battery
